title: Cardiothoracic information collation exercise: additional survey analysis
body: "The Department of Health and Social Care undertook research to understand patient and staff views on heart and lung transplant services in England and Glasgow.  This report summarises the findings from the patient survey on the following areas, analysed by transplant centre, sex and ethnicity:   transplant assessment transplant and post-transplant experience communication health and wellbeing support   It also summarises the findings from the staff survey on the following areas, analysed by transplant centre and profession:   transplant services workforce and resources   This report is supplementary to the initial survey analysis published in October 2024. "
